calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Off Calendar

Application For Judgment Establishing Title To Real Property Under The Destroyed Records Relief Law [Ccp Section 751 Et. Seq.]
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848
Steven J. Kahn, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 1532 Harrison Investment, LLC, a California limited liability company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant All person claiming any interest in, or lien upon, the real property herein described or any part thereof.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Witnesses: Grant Barbour and Jackie Luk sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:
1. On June 9, 2016, the date this Action commenced, Plaintiff was the owner in fee simple absolute, and in actual and peaceful possession as owner of all the real property described in the Complaint herein, including the Gap Property described in Exhibit B, attached hereto, and diagrammed in Exhibit B-1 and Exhibit B-2.
2. Plaintiff's title to the real property described in Exhibit A and Exhibit B, hereto, is established and quieted to the world;
3. All persons other that Plaintiff are perpetually barred, enjoined, and estopped from asserting or setting up any estate, right, title, lien, interest or claim in and to the real property described in Exhibit A and Exhibit B herein, and any part thereof, whether legal or equitable, present or future, vested or contingent, or mortgages or liens, of any description.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Continued To Apr-12-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Continued To Feb-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
